cause_analysis.narrative: Men’s Bodywork by Trevor James churned on 2026-04-17 after 117 days with Zoca. 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [SLA] 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-04-16 via app_chat, client wrote: "Santhosh, kindly put my account on hold until further notice. Please make sure its done before I get charged for the nex…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

[SLA example] On 2026-04-17 via sms, client wrote: "Santhosh, kindly put my account on hold until further notice. Please make sure its done before I get charged for the nex…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
